title: War Outbreak: Preemptive Strikes
desc: US and Israel launch strikes on Iranian military and air defenses in Tehran and Isfahan.

title: Iranian Retaliation Against UAE
desc: Swarm attack on Jebel Ali Port. Tanker Athe Nova struck.

title: Ras Tanura & Stena Imperative
desc: Attack on Saudi Arabia's largest refinery.

title: Fujairah Bypass Neutralized
desc: Repeated attacks cripple UAE's Fujairah port.

title: IDF Dismantles Iranian Logistics
desc: Abadan refinery and oil depots critically damaged.

title: Bapco Sitra Hit
desc: Iranian drones strike Bahrain's primary refinery.

title: Ruwais Refinery Shutdown
desc: Full shutdown of ADNOC's complex.

title: Iran Begins Mining Strait of Hormuz
desc: Iran starts laying sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz. US CENTCOM destroys 16 Iranian minelayers in response. Shipping firms begin suspending Gulf operations.

title: Hormuz Minefield Expands — Tankers Reroute
desc: US destroys 44 Iranian mine-laying vessels as Hormuz blockade tightens. 15 million bpd of crude stranded in the Gulf. Brent hits $100+ for first time in four years.

title: Majnoon & Marine Engagements
desc: Iraq drawn in. CENTCOM sinks over 60 vessels.

title: Kharg Island Ultimatum
desc: Massive US bombing of Kharg Island logistics.

title: Shah Sour Gas Field Attacked
desc: Removes 5% of world sulfur from the market.

title: Rubicon: South Pars Bombed
desc: Israel bombs Iran's primary gas source.

title: LNG Shock & Kuwait Attack
desc: Fires at Ras Laffan (Qatar). Kuwaiti refineries bombed.

title: UAE Habshan Gas Facility Bombed
desc: Iran targeted the Habshan gas field in Abu Dhabi's Western Region with ballistic missiles and drones. UAE air defenses intercepted 13 missiles and 27 drones; debris caused explosions and fires, forcing suspension of operations.

title: 16 Cargo Ships Bombed in Southern Iranian Ports
desc: US and Israel bomb 16 cargo ships in the ports of Bandar Lengeh and Bandar Kong in Hormozgan province. All 16 vessels destroyed by fire, disrupting remaining Iranian coastal logistics.

title: US Strikes Iranian Coastal Bunkers at Hormuz
desc: US forces target Iranian military bunkers along the Hormuzgan coastline near the Strait of Hormuz, degrading Iran's capacity to lay further mines and threaten tanker traffic.

title: Mina Al-Ahmadi Hit Again
desc: Fires broke out across multiple units at Kuwait's Mina al-Ahmadi refinery early Friday morning following renewed Iranian drone attacks. The 730k bpd facility suffered further damage.

title: Yanbu Refinery Drone Strike
desc: Iranian drone struck the Yanbu refinery on Saudi Arabia's Red Sea coast, targeting infrastructure outside the Persian Gulf chokepoint.

title: Iranian Missile Strikes Haifa Refinery
desc: An Iranian missile struck the Haifa oil refinery complex in Israel. Israeli Energy Minister said damage was minor; black smoke seen rising from the facility.

title: Mina Al-Ahmadi Hit Second Consecutive Day
desc: Iranian drones struck Kuwait's Mina al-Ahmadi refinery for the second consecutive day, causing fires across multiple units. Kuwait's military actively intercepting incoming drone and missile threats; no casualties reported.

title: Haifa Bazan Refinery Struck Again
desc: An Iranian missile struck the Bazan oil refinery in Haifa for a second time, igniting a fire at a benzene tanker on the site perimeter. Fire was contained within hours; Israeli Energy Minister confirmed minor damage, no risk to fuel supply.

title: Kuwaiti VLCC Al-Salmi Hit at Dubai
desc: Iran struck the Kuwait-flagged Very Large Crude Carrier Al-Salmi while it was anchored at the Port of Dubai, setting the fully loaded tanker ablaze. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation warned of a potential oil spill.

title: Mina Al-Ahmadi Drone Attack Resumes
desc: Iranian drone attack caused fires across multiple operational units at Kuwait's Mina al-Ahmadi refinery on April 3. Kuwait National Petroleum Co. emergency teams deployed to contain the fires.

title: Kuwait KPC and PIC Facilities Significantly Damaged
desc: Kuwait National Petroleum Co. and Petrochemical Industries Co. facilities suffered significant damage as emergency and fire response teams worked to contain multiple conflagrations at several sites.

title: Ruwais Refinery Multiple Fires from Air Defense Debris
desc: Ruwais refinery suffered multiple fires caused by falling debris from UAE air-defense interception of incoming Iranian missiles, Abu Dhabi government confirmed. The already-damaged ADNOC complex sustained further hits.

title: Bahrain GPIC Petrochemical Plant Drone Strike
desc: Several operational units at Gulf Petrochemical Industries Co. (GPIC) in Bahrain caught fire following Iranian drone attacks. The facility, adjacent to the Bapco Sitra refinery, sustained significant damage.

title: Saudi East-West Pipeline Pumping Station Struck
desc: An IRGC drone strike hit a pumping station on Saudi Arabia's 1,200 km East-West Petroline pipeline early April 8, the same day a US-Iran ceasefire was announced. The pipeline had been running at emergency capacity of 7 million bpd to route oil to the Red Sea bypassing the Strait of Hormuz.
